_source: .omo/work/galaxy-extract/page101-bg.jpg actual circular star centers; this JSON is seed data for DB import, not live server state

_method.coordinate: actual raster star-circle center, not PDF annotation or black inner line
_method.color: background-subtracted disk color from the actual raster star circle; center pixel alone is recorded only as centerPixelRgb and is not used for spectral class
_method.assignment: 80 unique raster dot candidates matched to the 80 manual labels; duplicate component count is zero in the audit artifact
